apps.name: Nomi: AI Companion with a Soul
Yano AI- Bring my Favs to Life

criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI for various functionalities such as content generation, sentiment analysis, social listening, and automation.
criteria.sources: Zapier, Sprout Social, SocialAI, Lovable Blog, Builder.ai

criteria.name: Automation Capabilities
criteria.description: The app's ability to automate tasks such as post scheduling, content recycling, and conditional posting.

criteria.name: Social Listening
criteria.description: The app's capacity to monitor social media platforms, forums, and review websites for brand mentions, trends, and customer insights using AI.

criteria.name: Content Generation
criteria.description: The ability of the app to generate social media posts, blog content, and ad copy using AI.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: How well the app personalizes the user experience using AI, such as tailored conversations and content.
